description: Encoder board mode switching methods and configuration software reference

software_functions: Key mapping (keyboard, gamepad, mouse, system commands)
ultimarc_ipac.auto_mode_switch: WinIPAC temporarily switches board to keyboard mode for programming

procedure.step1: Press and hold Start1 (or user-defined shift button)
procedure.step2: While holding, press and hold P1 Button 1-5 for 10 seconds
procedure.step3: No other inputs during this time

mode_switching.persistence: Saved to board memory, retained after power cycle
mode_switching.device_behavior: Each mode appears as different USB device

limitations.xinput: Shift key functionality NOT available in XInput mode

pactotech.config_method: Physical inputs (button combos, wired switches, jumpers)

dedicated_mode_pins.description: Wire mode pins to physical buttons/toggle switches

permanent_jumpers.description: Jumper mode pins to ground for fixed configuration

twinstick.name: Twinstick Mode
twinstick.description: Remaps 4-player joysticks to left/right sticks for 2 players

six_button.name: 6-Button Layout Remapping
six_button.use_case: Street Fighter II, MAME fighting games

interlock.name: Interlock Mode
interlock.description: Requires 2-second hold for Start+Back to prevent accidental exits

zero_delay.customization: Must remap in emulator or OS controller settings

xin_mo.customization: Must remap in emulator or OS controller settings

brook.manual_override: Button combinations exist for forcing specific modes

advanced_features.socd_cleaning: Configured via button holds on startup
advanced_features.button_remapping: Via firmware updates or startup combos

when_controller_not_working: 1. Identify encoder type (check VID/PID or board markings)
2. Determine current mode (HID query, SpecVision, or test inputs)
3. Check game/emulator requirements (Keyboard vs XInput vs DirectInput)
4. If mode mismatch: use appropriate switching method
5. For fixed-mode boards: remap in emulator settings

mode_detection_methods.ipac: WinIPAC will show current mode, or test if inputs register as keyboard vs gamepad
mode_detection_methods.pactotech: SpecVision OLED shows mode, or test input behavior
mode_detection_methods.xin_mo: Always gamepad - check Windows Game Controllers
